title: BasicMMO
body:
# What is BasicMMO
BasicMMO is an innovative plugin developed for Minecraft that enables players to choose classes, level up, and experience dynamic gameplay.

- My suggestion is **/mmo help** command.

# Features:
### Class System:
- Players can determine their playstyle by choosing from various classes such as miner, fishman, and timberman.
### Dynamic Leveling:
- Each class's unique effects grow stronger as the player progresses in level.
### Unique Extra Effects:
- For example, the miner class benefits from a Fortune-like effect when breaking ores, the fishman class receives a luck bonus while fishing, and the timberman class gains extra wood drops.
### In-Game Interactions:
- Effects are automatically refreshed in situations such as drinking milk or using specific commands.
### Skill Tree(/mmo):
- You can choose or change your class, view your information, and also select abilities (I'm still working on this part).
# Why BasicMMO?
BasicMMO adds depth and strategic variety to the classic Minecraft experience. Every player gains unique advantages through their chosen class, while the dynamic leveling system provides a continuous sense of progression and rewards.
# Classes
## Miner
- Ore multiplier reaches 2 at the final level.
- Gain Haste I at level 5 and Health Boost II at level 10.
![Miner Class](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ac18ad40235a82f911a9cf1cf6b96d217eea6e14_0.webp) 
## Fisherman
- Special effect similar to the Luck of the Sea, providing an extra 10% item yield and increasing the items obtained from fishing per level, up to a maximum of 2x.
- Gain Night Vision I at level 5 and Health Boost II at level 10.
![fisherman class](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8e4ec065cdbd590631e01e30f8ed24c996d56afc_0.webp)
## Timberman
- Wood multiplier reaches 2 at the final level.
- Gain Strength I at level 5 and Health Boost II at level 10.
